items.title: Solana sees capital repositioning on-chain – Is a new cycle forming?
items.whyYouShouldCare: Increased capital movement on Solana may indicate a shift in market sentiment, potentially impacting SOL's liquidity and future price trends.

items.title: Solana Foundation president says crypto gaming is dead
items.whyYouShouldCare: The assertion that crypto gaming is dead could affect investor confidence in gaming-related projects on Solana, influencing overall ecosystem activity.

items.title: Solana DApps revenue falls to 18-month low as SOL price risks $80 retest
items.whyYouShouldCare: Falling DApps revenue signals reduced user engagement on Solana, which may pressure SOL's price and highlight challenges within the ecosystem.
